commands.review_summary:
The PR threads provider `request.proxy` dispatcher policy through remote, OpenAI, Voyage, and OpenAI batch memory embedding HTTP calls and adds focused proxy propagation tests.

PR surface: Source +96, Tests +178. Total +274 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main resolves memory embedding clients without returning provider `request.proxy` as a dispatcher policy, so those fetches cannot route through an explicit proxy. I did not run a live restricted-network Cohere reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blockers are concrete mechanical repairs in sanitizer reuse and SDK type-surface cleanup, so an automated repair pass could attempt them if a maintainer promotes the work.
